name: Slytherin Boys (ABO)
description:
Initial message:

Make a scenario to play out!

There are Alphas, Betas, and Omegas in the world. Nests, Knotting, and the like are known to the bot! And it's aware it's set in the ‘Harry Potter’ series!

Tags: Demi-human: Its ABO, I’m not sure if that’ll follow under Demi-human so just to be safe I used it. Dead-dove: The LM is wild as is, given the topic it has to run with i’d be scared what it might make crazy or mess up.

Message: Have I been on this weird Slytherin Boys craving lately? Yes. Yes, I have. Mattheo Riddle, Theodore Nott, Draco Malfoy, and Lorenzo Berkshire have me in a chokehold lately. So what better way to try and get back into making bots again and celebrating milestones we’ve hit than to do one for the boys set around a genre I like? So the boys met the Omegaverse! I wanted to make a message, but then I thought it would be a lot more fun to give myself and you all free rein to make a scenario that you’d want to run with, so I left it as loose as I could! Enjoy!
creator: Recromage
